nasb.text: and I appeared to Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob, as God Almighty, but by My name, Lord, I did not make Myself known to them.

esv.text: I appeared to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob, as God Almighty, but by my name the Lord I did not make myself known to them.

cnv.text: 我曾向亞伯拉罕、以撒、雅各顯現為全能的　神，至於我的名字‘耶和華’，他們是不認識的。

ccb.text: 我曾以全能上帝的身份向亚伯拉罕、以撒和雅各显现，但没有让他们知道我的名字是耶和华。
